title: Vanilla Refined
description: This modpack contains mods that enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience. It features QOL mods that can assist with survival, redstone, building, datapack creation, and everything in between.
body:
# Welcome to Vanilla Refined!
Have you wanted to play Minecraft, but the newer versions are just too demanding? With Vanilla Refined, you can play Minecraft without baking your potato PC!

Vanilla Refined also contains many features that enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience. We have all of the QOL features you want, and it just takes a few clicks to install!

No more worrying about different API versions and mod incompatibilities! I already took care of that. Now you can play Minecraft without the hassle of making your game playable!

# Performance
This pack was carefully designed, researched, and tested to provide exceptional performance for any computer. Each mod was carefully analyzed to make sure it exceeded our performance criteria.

# QOL
Vanilla Refined features QOL mods that can assist with normal survival, redstone, building, datapack creation, and everything in between. We aim to add features that enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience while keeping the vanilla feel.

# Comfort
Vanilla Refined aims to make your game feel as comfy as possible. It comes with a zoom mod that imitates the classic OptiFine feel while giving you more control. The pack also includes menu blur, dark mode, and more!

# Housekeeping
I'll try my best with updates, but I can only update once most mods are updated. Alpha and beta versions have no performance or stability guarantees.
